title: Post-compaction recovery: pre-compact.sh writes compacted.flag, user-prompt-submit.sh injects re-orientation block on next prompt
perceive: After context compaction, the model silently reconstructs context (often incorrectly). Without intervention the next user prompt resumes as if nothing happened.
execute: pre-compact.sh: write 'true' to WAI-Spoke/runtime/compacted.flag before exit
user-prompt-submit.sh: check for compacted.flag before GUARD_COMPLETED skip — if found, set POST_COMPACT=true, delete flag
user-prompt-submit.sh: change guard skip to [[ GUARD_COMPLETED == true && POST_COMPACT == false ]] && exit 0
user-prompt-submit.sh Python block: if POST_COMPACT env var is true, append <wai-post-compact> re-orientation block to additionalContext
verify: grep POST_COMPACT .claude/hooks/user-prompt-submit.sh returns results; grep compacted.flag .claude/hooks/pre-compact.sh returns results
audit_note: Confirmed delivered to hub WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/signal/delivered/ — closed by audit task-track-rebuild-audit-20260527
decision_reason: Already marked delivered. Audit note: Confirmed delivered to hub WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/signal/delivered/ — closed by a
